parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id AS task_id,
  t.shop_id,
  t.caller_id,
  t.call_id,
  t.task_type,
  t.priority,
  t.assigned_to,
  t.status,
  t.due_at,
  t.escalation_count,
  t.notes,
  s.name AS shop_name,
  s.transfer_number AS shop_phone,
  s.sms_from_number,
  c.phone AS caller_phone,
  c.name AS caller_name
FROM tasks t
JOIN shops s ON s.id = t.shop_id
LEFT JOIN callers c ON c.id = t.caller_id
WHERE t.status = 'open'
  AND t.due_at < now()
  AND t.priority IN ('urgent', 'high')
ORDER BY
  CASE t.priority
    WHEN 'urgent' THEN 1
    WHEN 'high' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  t.due_at ASC
LIMIT 50;

UPDATE tasks
SET
  escalation_count = {{ $json.escalation_count }},
  escalated_at = now(),
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.task_id }}';

INSERT INTO messages (shop_id, caller_id, call_id, message_type, sms_body, to_number, from_number)
SELECT
  t.shop_id,
  t.caller_id,
  t.call_id,
  'sms_outbound',
  '{{ $node["Build Escalation Message"].json.escalation_message }}',
  '{{ $json.shop_phone }}',
  '{{ $json.sms_from || '' }}'
FROM tasks t
WHERE t.id = '{{ $json.task_id }}';
